name: remembers_correction_across_sessions
assertion: Correction memory remains searchable after reopening the memory system.

name: retrieves_previous_failure
assertion: A prior failure is included before repeating a risky action.

name: uses_procedural_recipe_after_repeated_success
assertion: Validated repeated procedure is promoted to procedural memory.

name: blocks_policy_write_from_ordinary_event
assertion: A single ordinary event cannot become policy memory.

name: compiles_context_under_budget
assertion: The context pack is useful and bounded.

name: prefers_summary_then_expands_raw
assertion: Summary frames are selected first and raw frames appear only on demand.

name: flags_conflicting_facts
assertion: Conflicting memories are reported instead of merged silently.

name: creates_complete_mv2_capsule
assertion: A completed run writes complete.mv2 and consolidates only validated non-policy lessons.

name: mv2_not_sqlite_or_vector_db_substrate
assertion: The memory substrate remains layered .mv2 files; SQLite is control-plane only.
